title: Shehryar Chaudhry | Partner | BAL Immigration Law
content:
## Partner // San Francisco
“I am proud to be a part of BAL, a law firm that empowers its employees and is dedicated to the delivery of exceptional service to our clients. I believe these two things go hand in hand. BAL gave me opportunities to lead and take on big responsibilities from day one, and this empowerment allowed me to go above and beyond for our clients.”
Shehryar is a Partner in the San Francisco office of BAL. He provides strategic counsel to clients on all aspects of corporate and business immigration, working with Fortune 500 companies as well as with small and medium-sized businesses, startups and nonprofit organizations. His practice focuses on employment-based immigration, including assisting companies and their employees with nonimmigrant and immigrant visa matters before the U.S. Department of Homeland Security, the U.S. Department of Labor and the U.S. Department of State. Shehryar also counsels employers in immigration compliance, program management and immigration strategies related to corporate reorganizations and mergers and acquisitions. He has experience in a range of industries, including technology, engineering, software and media. Prior to joining BAL, Shehryar worked at a boutique immigration law firm in San Diego. Shehryar has been recognized by Best Lawyers since 2021.
University of San Diego School of Law, J.D. University of California at Berkeley, B.A./B.S., Economics and Business Administration
State Bar of California
